## Week in Review: 2026-03-09 to 2026-03-15

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 21.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 8.7 (+7.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 7.4 (-18.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 6.6 (+17.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.29)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 21.0 (+8.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.11)
